channel.title: python on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in python on My Hugo

item.title: misc
item.description: Tutorials Infinitely Abstract | Artful Programming, Clean Design Tutorials - Javatpoint ProgramCreek.com Class Central • #1 Search Engine for Free Online Courses & MOOCs Programming Tutorials and Source Code Examples The Quick Guide to GUIDs – BetterExplained DesignCourse - YouTube Welcome to Our Code World | Our Code World How to retrieve images from the clipboard with JavaScript in the Browser | Our Code World How to create a screenshot

item.title: python
item.description: Python 2.7.12 documentation DevDocs API Documentation JavaScript | MDN W3Schools YAML Ain’t Markup Language (YAML™) Version 1.2 PyDev Interactive Console Pyjs Python Module of the Week pdb – Interactive Debugger - Python Module of the Week IPython Documentation — IPython 4.2.0 documentation grequests 0.3.0 : Python Package Index Basic module usage — Psycopg 2.6.2.dev0 documentation Gevent Tutorial A guide to Python Namespaces – The ByteBaker Pygments - python syntax highlighter Python 3 Module of the Week — PyMOTW 3 Factory pattern in python

item.title: test
item.description: 10 Code Coverage Tools For C & C++ | Troy Hunt: Test data done right with SQL Data Generator TkDocs - Tk Tutorial - Introduction Getting Started with Automation Testing: ProQuest Tech Books Google Test fuzzing lcamtuf's blog: Binary fuzzing strategies: what works, what doesn't Pin - A Dynamic Binary Instrumentation Tool | Intel® Software DynamoRIO Dynamic Instrumentation Tool Platform Basic block - Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia Fun With American Fuzzy Lop - A quick tutorial - Necurity Advanced usage of American Fuzzy Lop with real world examples | VolatileMinds lcamtuf's blog: afl-fuzz: making up grammar with a dictionary in hand lcamtuf's blog: Finding bugs in SQLite, the easy way The Fuzzing Project - Background american fuzzy lop A gentle introduction to fuzzing C++ code with AFL and libFuzzer Fuzzing with american fuzzy lop [LWN.
